packets.title: SEQC2/HCC1395 WES HRD Readiness Packet
packets.allowedConclusion: This sample demonstrates WES small-variant and caller-readiness behavior. It does not support a genome-wide HRD scar, SV, SBS3, CHORD, or HRDetect-style score.

packets.title: SEQC2/HCC1395 WGS HRD Evidence-Surface Packet
blockers: Current SV evidence summary has no discordant mapped-pair counts; regenerate full SV evidence before using WGS as the flagship HRD packet.
packets.allowedConclusion: This sample exercises the WGS evidence surfaces needed for HRD review. It remains a partial HRD evidence packet until allele-specific CNV/LOH, production SV calls, signature thresholds, CHORD/scarHRD/HRDetect policy, and known-answer performance are locked.

packets.title: GIAB HG008 Truth-Set Readiness Packet
blockers: No Diana-generated CNV callset or reciprocal-overlap result exists for HG008.
No Diana-generated SV callset exists for HG008 in this expanded bounded run.
No Diana-generated SV/CNV callset exists for HG008 in this bounded run.
packets.allowedConclusion: HG008 is a truth-set validation sample. It should improve confidence in caller correctness and CNV/SV benchmarking, not produce a Diana-style HRD interpretation.

packets.title: COLO829/COLO829BL Tumor-Normal Guardrail Packet
blockers: COLO829 submitted BAMs and fetched hg38-lifted truth still require build reconciliation.
COLO829 submitted BAMs are GRCh37-style while the fetched SV truth VCF is hg38-lifted.
Selected purity BAMs require full transfer or local indexing before monotonic recall can be tested.
packets.allowedConclusion: COLO829 is an independent tumor-normal and driver-recovery guardrail. It does not establish HRD status until full SV/CNA/signature evidence is generated and benchmarked.

packets.title: Diana Raw BAM/FASTQ Intake Readiness Packet
blockers: Actual Diana BAM/FASTQ/CRAM paths have not passed strict intake validation.
packets.allowedConclusion: This packet proves the raw-data intake contract is ready. It does not validate Diana files or produce HRD evidence until the actual BAM/FASTQ/CRAM paths are supplied and pass strict intake validation.

sourcePattern.ngs: Derived from NGS Analysis router/runtime/DNA somatic patterns: inspect inputs, preflight, route, preserve provenance.
sourcePattern.research: Derived from Life Science Research router/variant/cancer/pathway patterns: normalize entities, query targeted sources, synthesize caveats.
